scripts.dev: DEMO=true pnpm run -F web -F server dev
scripts.generate:images: npx tsx playwright/screenshots.ts && npx gifsicle --colors 256 --delay 300 --loop --optimize=3 --resize-fit 420x700 -o playwright/checked-demo.gif playwright/step1-main.gif playwright/step2-sidebar.gif playwright/step3-settings.gif
